creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text: Or clarify/expand the sections where they're mentioned. It looks from cxgbe(4) like the former 2 may be sysctl hw.cxgbe.nofldrxq and sysctl hw.cxgbe.nofldtxq, but if so, that should be explicit. As to ifnet, is it a reference to ifnet(9)? To struct ifnet? Either way, it also needs clarification and if the former, a SEE ALSO .Xr.
